name: Spinach Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
1 package Knorr vegetable seasoning and recipe mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the mayonnaise, sour cream, thawed spinach, Knorr vegetable seasoning mix, and chopped water chestnuts until well combined.
2. Stir in the optional green onions.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld before serving.
4. Makes approximately 3 cups.
